sentences.target: Tu as reçu mon message hier.

translations.fr: Tu as reçu mon message hier.
translations.de: Du hast gestern meine Nachricht bekommen.
translations.it: Hai ricevuto il mio messaggio ieri.
translations.zh-Hans: 你昨天收到了我的消息。
translations.vi: Hôm qua bạn đã nhận được tin nhắn của tôi.
translations.nl: Je hebt gisteren mijn bericht ontvangen.
translations.nb: Du fikk meldingen min i går.
translations.sv: Du fick mitt meddelande i går.
translations.da: Du fik min besked i går.
translations.ja: 昨日、私のメッセージを受け取ったよ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; performs the action in the compound past.
Auxiliary verb in present 2sg forming the passé composé with the past participle 'reçu'.
Past participle functioning as the main lexical verb in the compound tense; takes 'mon message' as direct object.
1st-person singular possessive determiner agreeing with the singular masculine noun 'message'.
Common noun serving as the direct object of 'reçu'.
Temporal adverb situating the action on the previous day.

sentences.target: Je te laisse un message vocal.

translations.fr: Je te laisse un message vocal.
translations.en: I’m leaving you a voice message.
translations.es: Te dejo un mensaje de voz.
translations.zh-Hans: 我给你留一条语音消息。
translations.pt: Estou te deixando uma mensagem de voz.
translations.vi: Tôi để lại cho bạn một tin nhắn thoại.
translations.nl: Ik laat je een spraakbericht achter.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारे लिए एक वॉइस संदेश छोड़ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg legger igjen en talemelding til deg.
translations.sv: Jag lämnar ett röstmeddelande till dig.
translations.da: Jeg lægger en talebesked til dig.
translations.ja: 音声メッセージを残します。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Clitic pronoun, 2nd person singular; indirect object ('to you') placed before the verb.
Main verb in present 1sg; governs 'un message vocal' (direct object) and 'te' (indirect object).
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun.
Common noun; direct object of 'laisse'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'message'; postposed, agrees in masculine singular.

sentences.target: On attend son message pour partir.

translations.fr: On attend son message pour partir.
translations.en: We’re waiting for their message to leave.
translations.es: Estamos esperando su mensaje para irnos.
translations.de: Wir warten auf seine Nachricht, um loszugehen.
translations.it: Aspettiamo il suo messaggio per partire.
translations.ko: 우리는 출발하려고 그 사람의 메시지를 기다리고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在等对方的消息再出发。
translations.yue: 我哋等對方嘅訊息先出發。
translations.ru: Мы ждём его сообщения, чтобы выйти.
translations.pt: Estamos esperando a mensagem dele para sair.
translations.he: אנחנו מחכים להודעה שלו כדי לצאת.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đợi tin nhắn của người đó để đi.
translations.nl: We wachten op zijn bericht om te vertrekken.
translations.uk: Ми чекаємо на його повідомлення, щоб вирушити.
translations.hi: हम उसके संदेश का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं ताकि निकल सकें.
translations.pl: Czekamy na jego wiadomość, żeby wyjść.
translations.el: Περιμένουμε το μήνυμά του για να φύγουμε.
translations.nb: Vi venter på meldingen hans for å dra.
translations.id: Kami menunggu pesan darinya untuk berangkat.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på hans meddelande för att ge oss av.
translations.ro: Așteptăm mesajul lui ca să plecăm.
translations.cs: Čekáme na jeho zprávu, abychom mohli vyrazit.
translations.da: Vi venter på hans besked for at tage af sted.
translations.fi: Odotamme hänen viestiään, jotta voimme lähteä.
translations.ja: 出発するためにその人のメッセージを待っています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun meaning 'we/one'; syntactically 3rd person.
Main verb in present 3sg; selects a direct object 'son message' and an infinitival purpose clause 'pour partir'.
3rd-person singular possessive determiner; agrees with masculine singular 'message'; possessor gender unspecified.
Common noun; direct object of 'attend'.
Preposition introducing an infinitival clause expressing purpose.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'pour' indicating intended action.

sentences.target: Ils répondent à chaque message rapidement.

translations.fr: Ils répondent à chaque message rapidement.
translations.en: They reply to every message quickly.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们对每条消息都回复得很快。
translations.yue: 佢哋對每條訊息都好快回覆。
translations.ru: Они быстро отвечают на каждое сообщение.
translations.pt: Eles respondem rapidamente a cada mensagem.
translations.vi: Họ trả lời nhanh mọi tin nhắn.
translations.ar: هم يردون بسرعة على كل رسالة.
translations.uk: Вони швидко відповідають на кожне повідомлення.
translations.hi: वे हर संदेश का जल्दी जवाब देते हैं.
translations.nb: De svarer raskt på hver melding.
translations.id: Mereka membalas setiap pesan dengan cepat.
translations.sv: De svarar snabbt på varje meddelande.
translations.da: De svarer hurtigt på hver besked.
translations.ja: 彼らはすべてのメッセージに素早く返信します.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed).
Main verb in present 3pl; takes a prepositional complement 'à chaque message'.
Preposition marking the oblique complement (indirect object) of the verb.
Invariable distributive determiner modifying singular 'message' with universal quantification.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'à'.
Manner adverb modifying the verb 'répondent'.

jp: Tu as reçu mon message hier.
Je te laisse un message vocal.
On attend son message pour partir.
Ils répondent à chaque message rapidement.
fr: Tu as reçu mon message hier.
Je te laisse un message vocal.
On attend son message pour partir.
Ils répondent à chaque message rapidement.
en: I’m leaving you a voice message.
We’re waiting for their message to leave.
They reply to every message quickly.
